The ethnicity codes used to represent these concepts are based upon the [CDC ethnicity and Ethnicity Code Set Version 1.0](http://www.cdc.gov/phin/resources/vocabulary/index.html) which includes over 900 concepts for representing race and ethnicity of which 43 reference ethnicity. The race codes used to represent these concepts are based upon the [CDC Race and Ethnicity Code Set Version 1.0](http://www.cdc.gov/phin/resources/vocabulary/index.html) which includes over 900 concepts for representing race and ethnicity of which 921 reference race.  The race concepts are grouped by and pre-mapped to the 5 OMB race categories:

 - American Indian or Alaska Native
 - Asian
 - Black or African American
 - Native Hawaiian or Other Pacific Islander
 - White.">US Core Race Extension:</td><td colspan="3"><ul><li>ombCategory: <a href="http://hl7.org/fhir/us/core/STU3.1.1/CodeSystem-cdcrec.html#cdcrec-2106-3">Race &amp; Ethnicity - CDC 2106-3</a>: White</li><li>text: White</li></ul></td></tr></table></div>

            </doseQuantity>

        </dosageInstruction>

              <frequency value="1"/>
              <period value="1"/>

status = active; intent = order; category = Inpatient; reported[x] = false; medication[x] = -&gt;Metronidazole 500 MG; authoredOn = 2024-02-01 20:33:00-0500</a></p><p><b>Measure Report Supplemental Data Element Reference (R5 surrogate extension)</b>: <a href="Observation-observation-example-ach-monthly-pass3-cdiff.html">Observation Clostridioides difficile (organism)</a></p><p><b>Measure Report Supplemental Data Element Reference (R5 surrogate extension)</b>: <a href="Observation-observation-example-ach-monthly-pass3-vitals-height.html">Observation Body height</a></p><p><b>Measure Report Supplemental Data Element Reference (R5 surrogate extension)</b>: <a href="Observation-observation-example-ach-monthly-pass3-vitals-weight.html">Observation Body weight</a></p><p><b>Measure Report Supplemental Data Element Reference (R5 surrogate extension)</b>: <a href="Patient-patient-example-ach-monthly-pass3.html">Pass3 ACH(official) Female, DoB: 2007-10-08 ( MRN: 1601191903010308 (use: usual, ))</a></p><p><b>Measure Report Supplemental Data Element Reference (R5 surrogate extension)</b>: <a href="Procedure-procedure-example-ach-monthly-pass3-transfusion.html">Procedure Transfusion of red blood cells (procedure)</a></p><p><b>Measure Report Supplemental Data Element Reference (R5 surrogate extension)</b>: <a href="ServiceRequest-servicerequest-example-ach-monthly-pass3-cdiff.html">ServiceRequest Clostridioides difficile toxin A [Presence] in Stool by Immunoassay</a></p><p><b>Measure Report Supplemental Data Element Reference (R5 surrogate extension)</b>: <a href="Specimen-specimen-example-ach-monthly-pass3-stool.html">Specimen: identifier = urn:oid:2.16.840.1.113883.19.5.1.798.32#C104082905,urn:oid:2.16.840.1.113883.19.5.1.798.800#C10408290:45; 2024-02-04 00:00:00+0000</p><p><b>improvementNotation</b>: <span title="Codes:{http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/measure-improvement-notation increase}">Increased score indicates improvement</span></p><blockquote><p><b>group</b></p><h3>Populations</h3><table class="grid"><tr><td style="display: none">-</td><td><b>Code</b></td><td><b>Count</b></td></tr><tr><td style="display: none">*</td><td><span title="Codes:{http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/measure-population initial-population}">Initial Population</span></td><td>1</td></tr></table></blockquote><p><b>evaluatedResource</b>: </p><ul><li><a href="Condition-condition-example-diagnosis-ach-monthly-pass3-problem.html">Condition Acute sinusitis (disorder)</a></li><li><a href="Condition-condition-example-diagnosis-ach-monthly-pass3.html">Condition Enterocolitis due to Clostridium difficile</a></li><li><a href="Coverage-coverage-example-ach-monthly-pass3.html">Coverage: identifier = Member Number: 0945345; type = Intermittent venous compression system pump (physical object)</a></li><li><a href="Encounter-encounter-example-ach-monthly-pass3-acute.html">Encounter: identifier = urn:oid:2.16.840.1.113883.19.5.1.698.8#10005104253a (use: usual, ); status = finished; class = inpatient acute (ActCode[9.0.0]#ACUTE); type = In-person encounter; period = 2024-02-02 16:43:00-0500 --&gt; 2024-02-03 19:58:00-0500</a></li><li><a href="Encounter-encounter-example-ach-monthly-pass3-short-stay.html">Encounter: identifier = urn:oid:2.16.840.1.113883.19.5.1.698.8#10005104253a (use: usual, ); status = in-progress; class = short stay (ActCode[9.0.0]#SS); type = Hospital admission, elective (procedure); period = 2024-02-01 14:12:00-0500 --&gt; 2024-02-02 16:43:00-0500; reasonCode = Diarrhea, unspecified</a></li><li><a href="MedicationAdministration-medadmin-example-ach-monthly-pass3-enoxaparin.html">MedicationAdministration: identifier = urn:oid:2.16.840.1.113883.19.5.1.798#101888833 (use: usual, ); The race concepts are grouped by and pre-mapped to the 5 OMB race categories:

 - Asian
 - Black or African American
 - Native Hawaiian or Other Pacific Islander
 - White.">US Core Race Extension:</td><td colspan="3"><ul><li>ombCategory: <a href="http://hl7.org/fhir/us/core/STU3.1.1/CodeSystem-cdcrec.html#cdcrec-2028-9">Race &amp; Ethnicity - CDC 2028-9</a>: Asian</li><li>text: White</li></ul></td></tr></table></div>
